overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, a Trauma Team medical vehicle, towering skyscrapers, and bustling pedestrian areas with digital billboards. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-quality ray-traced lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street corner with medical emergency vehicle

events.description: Trauma Team medical vehicle comes into view ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk approaching a medical emergency vehicle with red neon lights

notable_agents.action: medical personnel attending to the Trauma Team vehicle

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
towering modern glass building with many lit windows
white medical vehicle with red neon underglow and 'TRAUMA TEAM' markings
tall street lamp illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked city sidewalk at night, approaching a Trauma Team medical vehicle parked near a towering glass skyscraper. Palm trees and neon signs line the street while sparse pedestrians walk with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area around emergency vehicle with skyscraper

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the top of the tall glass skyscraper
camera tilts back down to horizontal and continues walking past the vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking around the Trauma Team vehicle and looking up at the towering skyscraper

segments.scene_description: Moving around the Trauma Team vehicle in an open plaza, the camera tilts up to admire the towering glass skyscraper before continuing past. The vehicle is left behind as the camera moves toward the next street section.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with graffiti wall and digital billboards ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing the large Tiger Claws graffiti wall

entered.detail: large black wall with red 'TIGER CLAWS' graffiti and Japanese characters
tall digital advertising screens showing various advertisements
blue and white vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrower street section with the prominent Tiger Claws graffiti wall on the right. Digital billboards become visible in the distance ahead, and the tall skyscraper recedes to the left as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with large digital billboards and street vendors

events.description: crossing the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy pedestrian area with many people carrying umbrellas, crossing the street near large advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: food stalls and vendor booths lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Entering a bustling open plaza dominated by massive digital billboards. The camera crosses the street among a moderate crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas, passing street vendors on the right while vehicles move along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway overpass with blue lighting

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and observing the blue lights overhead

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with blue decorative lights underneath

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass with blue neon lights lining the underside. The environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain, with vehicles passing on the road to the left and palm trees lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a wide plaza dominated by a medical vehicle toward a narrower, graffiti-lined street. It begins on a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon signs, approaching a parked Trauma Team vehicle beneath a towering glass skyscraper. As the camera circles the vehicle in the open plaza, it tilts upward to take in the scale of the skyscraper before gliding past the scene. The environment then shifts into a tighter street section where the skyscraper recedes to the left and a wall covered in Tiger Claws graffiti emerges on the right. Finally, the camera pushes forward as the narrow corridor opens up toward glowing digital billboards in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-drenched open plaza into the sheltered enclosure of a massive highway overpass. It begins by crossing a bustling street amidst a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas, passing by street vendors and flowing traffic beneath the glow of towering digital billboards. As the camera advances, the open skyline begins to vanish, and the scene shifts toward the heavy concrete architecture of an elevated road. The environment then becomes more enclosed as the camera moves beneath the overpass, where the lighting transitions to vibrant blue neon strips lining the ceiling. Finally, the path continues alongside a road of passing vehicles to the left and a row of palm trees to the right, shielded from the falling rain.
